data.title: Drax Group Boosts Share Value with Buyback
data.description:
Drax Group plc (GB:DRX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Drax Group plc has recently acquired 233,734 of its own ordinary shares as part of a buyback program initiated in August 2024. The share buyback aims to optimize capital structure and enhance shareholder value, with the weighted average purchase price noted at 648.77 pence. This transaction contributes to a total of 15.77 million shares bought back since the program’s start.

data.title: Groupe Bruxelles Lambert Advances Share Buyback Program

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (GBL) has successfully executed 53.6% of its seventh share buyback program, purchasing 103,639 shares between December 2 and December 6, 2024. data.title: Aptose Biosciences Advances TUS as AML Therapy
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

The latest update is out from Aptose Biosciences ( (TSE:APS) ).

Aptose Biosciences is advancing tuspetinib (TUS), a promising oral kinase inhibitor, as a frontline therapy for newly diagnosed acute myeloid leukemia (AML) patients ineligible for intensive chemotherapy. The TUS+VEN+AZA combination therapy shows potential in overcoming VEN resistance, offering broad efficacy and favorable safety in AML patients, including those with challenging genetic mutations. The ongoing clinical trials aim to establish a new standard of care for AML, targeting significant unmet needs in the market.

See more data about APS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Carrefour Completes Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Carrefour (FR:CA) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Carrefour has completed its €700 million share buyback program for 2024, purchasing a total of 47,651,459 shares, and has also repurchased an additional 92,734 shares. These shares will be used to deliver the 2022 performance share plan to employees in 2025. This move reflects Carrefour’s strong commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

data.title: Baillie Gifford Enhances Treasury Stock Holdings
data.description:
Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust PLC GBP (GB:BGEU) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Baillie Gifford European Growth Trust has announced the acquisition of 75,000 of its own shares at the price of 87.80p, which will be held in Treasury. This strategic move raises the total number of treasury shares to 53,086,105, impacting how shareholders calculate their interests under FCA guidelines. These actions reflect the company’s ongoing management of its equity capital.
